expectations.text: A security-report.md file is written to outputs/
Report contains an Executive Summary with severity counts
expectations.evidence: Report includes table with Critical(3), High(4), Medium(5), Low(3) counts

expectations.text: Report includes a clear production-ready verdict
expectations.evidence: Verdict: 'CRITICAL ISSUES — Do not go live yet'
CRITICAL-001 covers live credentials in .env; git history for .env.template key

expectations.text: Report checks Django security settings (DEBUG, HTTPS, cookies)
expectations.evidence: CRITICAL-002 is the DEBUG string truthiness bug; CSRF/SESSION cookies covered in passed checks. 22 grep hits.

expectations.text: Report audits docker-compose.yml for port exposure and credentials
expectations.evidence: Redis unpinned/no auth, postgres:latest, port bindings covered in MEDIUM section
34 occurrences of Remediation/Fix keywords; code examples provided for DEBUG fix and path traversal

expectations.text: Missing security tools are documented with install instructions
expectations.evidence: 11 occurrences of brew/pip install; skill's tool installation section included
